title: Frog Totem of Undying
description: This is a funny resource pack that replaces the Totem of Undying with a frog. As a small addition, this frog will occasionally blink and look away. Frogs will save your life!
body:
Totem of Undying will be changed with frog!
This frog can blink and look away. 
And when you die, this frog will sacrifice himself and croak one last time... (sad)

![Frog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zhVkWd1Q/images/c26118cc6187f5e16b65fa0c861ec6fcdaa1763b.png)
